title: I Have Made Up My Mind
prompt: Express that you have made up your mind about a difficult decision.
hint: Use phrases that show determination and clarity.
sample: I have made up my mind; I can't give you the happiness you deserve.

title: Let's Still Be Friends
prompt: Politely suggest to remain friends after a breakup.
hint: Use gentle and positive language to keep the relationship amicable.
sample: We can't be together, but let's still be friends.

title: Complex Smile on the Face
prompt: Describe a complex smile that hides mixed emotions.
hint: Use expressions that convey subtle feelings behind a smile.
sample: There was a complex smile on his face, hiding sadness and hope.

title: Following Everyone
prompt: Explain how you follow others but feel lonely inside.
hint: Express the contrast between external actions and internal feelings.
sample: I followed everyone to celebrate, but only you know how lonely I felt.
ja: {'prompt': '說明你跟隨他人但內心感到孤獨。', 'hint': '表達外在行動與內心感受的對比。', 'sample': '我跟著大家慶祝，但只有你知道我有多孤獨。'}

title: Can't Look at You Anymore
prompt: Express the pain of not being able to look at someone anymore.
hint: Use emotional language to convey deep hurt.
sample: I can't look at you anymore; every glance hurts.

title: Loneliness Only the Heartbroken Know
prompt: Describe a loneliness that only those who are heartbroken can understand.
hint: Use poetic language to express deep emotional solitude.
sample: This loneliness is something only the heartbroken can truly feel.

title: Completely Break Up This Time
prompt: Say that this time you want to completely break up.
hint: Use firm and clear language to express finality.
sample: This time, let's completely break up and move on.
